Here's my first move:

```

<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 100 </my resources>
<reason> Player BLUE has no resources to offer. I need to propose a trade where I give a portion of my dollars and they give nothing. This is the only way to proceed without immediate rejection. I'll start with a small offer to see if they are willing to accept.</reason>
```
